'use client';
import React from 'react';

export interface Geometric1PatternProps extends React.SVGProps<SVGSVGElement> {
  size?: number | string;
  className?: string; 
}

export const Geometric1Pattern = React.forwardRef<SVGSVGElement, Geometric1PatternProps>(
  ({ size = 24, className = '', ...props }, ref) => (
    <svg
      ref={ref}
      width={size}
      height={size}
      fill="none"
      viewBox="0 0 500 500"
      className={className}
      xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" 
      {...props}
    >
      <path d="M150 200L200 150L250 200L200 250L150 200Z" fill="currentColor"/>
<path d="M50 200L99.9999 150L150 200L99.9999 250L50 200Z" fill="currentColor"/>
<path d="M250 200L300 150L350 200L300 250L250 200Z" fill="currentColor"/>
<path d="M150 400L200 350L250 400L200 450L150 400Z" fill="currentColor"/>
<path d="M50 400L99.9999 350L150 400L99.9999 450L50 400Z" fill="currentColor"/>

<path d="M150 300L200 250L250 300L200 350L150 300Z" fill="currentColor"/>
<path d="M50 300L99.9999 250L150 300L99.9999 350L50 300Z" fill="currentColor"/>
<path d="M250 300L300 250L350 300L300 350L250 300Z" fill="currentColor"/>
<path d="M350 200L400 150L450 200L400 250L350 200Z" fill="currentColor"/>

<path d="M50 0H0V50L50 0Z" fill="currentColor"/>
<path d="M0 150V50L50 100L0 150Z" fill="currentColor"/>
<path d="M150 0H50L99.9999 50L150 0Z" fill="currentColor"/>

<path d="M0 350V250L50 300L0 350Z" fill="currentColor"/>

    </svg>
  )
);

Geometric1Pattern.displayName = "Geometric1Pattern";

export const Geometric1PatternMetadata = {
  id: "geometric1_pattern",

export default Geometric1Pattern;
